pageTitle: cyAre there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyAre there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
mainQuestion: cyAre there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
reasonForNotSharingQuestion: cyProvide a reason this application should not be shared with the other party
weUsuallySendACopyOfYourApplication: cyWe usually send a copy of your application to the other parties (your landlord, housing association or mortgage lender). This gives them the opportunity to respond to it.
inSomeExceptionalCircumstances: cyIn some exceptional circumstances, the judge will consider your application without telling the other party first.
itIsUrgent: cyit is so urgent that there is not enough time to give notice
couldUndermineTheOrder: cygiving someone notice could undermine the order you want the court to grant.
youBelieveYouAreAtRisk: cyyou believe you are at risk from the other party
weWillAskYouToProvideTheReason: cyWe will ask you to provide the reason. The court will consider your reason, and you may not be successful.

errors.confirmIfThereIsAReason: cyConfirm whether there is a reason why this application should not be shared with the other parties
errors.provideAReason: cyConfirm why the other parties shoud not be informed
